# Constrails 0.1.0-alpha

This alpha milestone establishes the first coherent MVP spine for Constrails as an external runtime safety layer for AI agents.

## Highlights

- canonical kernel path and FastAPI API surface
- unified broker and adapter flow
- capability manifests with meaningful constraints
- approval workflow and replay path
- sandbox execution path with dev and Docker-backed modes
- audit and sandbox provenance persistence
- operator-facing CLI with approval, audit, sandbox, and JSON output support
- admin inspection endpoints with filtering support
- sample OPA bundle and deployment examples
- expanding automated test coverage

## Included operator capabilities

- initialize and serve the system from the CLI
- inspect approvals, audit history, and sandbox history
- approve or deny requests from the CLI
- query admin inspection endpoints with filters
- run with sample OPA policy assets
- run with a starter Compose deployment + OPA sidecar

## Notes

This is alpha software.

It is intended for development, experimentation, and iterative hardening — not as a finished production control plane.

## Next likely priorities

- stronger authentication and identity handling
- broader policy coverage and richer OPA workflows
- stronger deployment posture and image pipeline
- improved release ergonomics and packaging flow
